title: Level-up!
description: RPG-like Progression mechanics! Now with Warden Bosses!
body:
# Leveling Time!

### Level up adds RPG like progression systems to almost everything you do in minecraft!           
- Level your individual stats by doing tasks related to them! (Level Combat by fighting, Excavation by digging, etc)
- Earn special Buffs and Passives like "Nocturnal eyes" to see in the dark!
- Prestige your levels to unlock even more powerful buffs like "Bigger and Better" to gain a huge boost to HP and Damage.
- Unlock your destiny, fishing from the seas below..

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Current update: Warden's Fall!
### The Scarlet King has corrupted these poor animals. Release them and figure out how to save them.
Corrupted Wardens has crawled from the depths as heralds of the Scarlet King.
these beings are "Enhanced" with certain Destructive powers to act out the will of the king.

### The Water Warden
- It uses deadly water infused attacks to slow and disable it's targets,
Extremely dangerous if not prepared to
dodge lightning attacks.


### The Flame Warden
- The intense heat this warden gives off
makes it dangerous to anyone near
when he gets angry. Extremely dangerous
if not prepared to fend off his lethal minions
The Fire Sprinters.

### The Crippled Warden
- This warden seems to possess no intelligence
resorting to violent and primal attacks. Extremely﻿
dangerous if not prepared to run if it.. Remembers?

### The Scarlet Warden
- Artificial, created by the scarlet king's fanatics,
he spreads disease﻿ and decay. Extremely dangerous
If not resistant to explosions. A herald to whats coming..

If you manage to release one of these beings
make sure to collect its heart. They seem to be-able to merge
with our DNA and make us stronger. Access these in the Prestige shop!

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# In-game Menus
### There are Menus you can access ingame.
- Do /trigger Togglemenu to change settings or disable or Re-enable perks.
you can also prestige here.

- Do /trigger PrestigeShop to spend your hard earned prestige points.
you can also access Warden Evolutions here once you have gained atleast 1 Warden heart

# INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS


### From an existing world
- Do /reload if that shows no results
do /trigger startgame

### From a new world
- There is an installer in-game 
If the button doesn't pop up, try /reload.
- If that doesnt work try /trigger startgame or /function levelup:stop

### If you have experienced the boosts disappearing
- put these commands in as OP
/scoreboard players add @s Death 1


Questions? Bug Find? [Join the Levelup Discord for support!](https://discord.gg/mjyNejzWmX)
